text:
In a small quiet town nestled somewhere deep within rolling green hills lived Una owl。She'd wake each morning finding mist lingering among the feathers. Her favourite perch would always be on an ancient oak beside her favorite cottage.

Every day Una owl felt things. She fancied she could hear music somewhere tinkling. Her friend Owlbert owl fancied he could taste licorice. Owlbert loved licorice.

Unluckily Owlbert ate licorpice sticks. One afternoon owlbrights fluttered through licorchestic dreams.

"Oh Owlbert!" owlUna moaned.

"The licórchestra?"

"No Owlbert!"

"Oh Owlbert."

Una thought Owlbert wouldn't believe her.

Just before owldark Owlbert swooped.

Una flew away. Owlbert landed munchingly.

"You heard huh?"

"You hear things Owlbert?"

"Oh owlLicorns?"

"Oh Owlbert."

They didn't say much after.That evening owlUna perched just watching owllights flicker. Suddenly moth wings fluttered
